name: LiveCodes
description: A feature-rich, open-source, client-side code playground that runs 90+ languages and frameworks directly in the browser. Self-hosted with Node.js server and Caddy reverse proxy, mirroring the upstream Docker setup.

notes.text: Build from source with SELF_HOSTED=true to use the local sandbox server. The prebuilt release tarball uses an external Cloudflare Pages sandbox which can cause loading issues.
Access runs on plain HTTP (port 80). Put it behind a reverse proxy with TLS for public exposure.
